_comment: Copy this file to tessera.config.json and fill in your values.

hosting._comment: Where your revoked.json and licenses.json live. Use your own domain so it's portable.

trial_registry._comment: Optional but recommended. Server-side trial tracking via Cloudflare Worker + KV.
trial_registry._comment2: Without this, trials can be reset by wiping local storage. With it, trial starts are registered server-side and cannot be reset.

stripe._comment: Optional. Set enabled=true to activate Stripe subscription billing.

notifications._comment: Optional. Get notified when licenses are created or revoked.
